headline: Coca-Cola CEO Shift Tests Decentralized Model And Insider Confidence
summary: Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) has appointed Henrique Braun as its new CEO. Current CEO James Quincey will move into the role of Executive Chairman. The leadership transition coincides with insider stock sale activity by executives. Coca-Cola continues to emphasize a more decentralized leadership structure in response to geopolitical risks. Coca-Cola, trading at $77.03, is in the spotlight as this leadership reshuffle arrives alongside discussion of insider stock sales and organizational structure...
